tags.name: `mc-accordion`
tags.description:
Purpose: Display collapsible content panels for better organization and navigation.
Category: Content Display
When to use: FAQs, Nested content, Disclosure sections
When not to use: Always expanded content, Simple lists
Works with components: mc-accordion-item
Alternative component names: Accordion, Collapsible Panel, Expandable Section

Events:

  * ``change`` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when an accordion item's expanded state changes.

  * `change` {`CustomEvent<IMcAccordionChangeDetail>`} - 

Slots:

  * ` ` {} - The default slot where the accordion items go.

Attributes:

  * `singleexpand` {`boolean`} - 

  * `fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

  * `expandiconposition` {ExpandIconPosition} - Position of the expand icon.

  * `withborder` {boolean} - When true, adds borders all around the accordion container.

Properties:

  * `singleexpand` {`boolean`} - 

  * `accordionItems` {`HTMLElement[]`} - 

  * `fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

  * `expandiconposition` {ExpandIconPosition} - Position of the expand icon.

  * `change` - Event emitted when an accordion item's expanded state changes.

  * `withborder` {boolean} - When true, adds borders all around the accordion container.

attributes.name: fit
attributes.description:
`fit` {Fit} - The fit of the component.

Property: fit

Default: medium

attributes.name: expandiconposition
attributes.description:
`expandiconposition` {ExpandIconPosition} - Position of the expand icon.

Property: expandiconposition

Default: right

attributes.name: withborder
attributes.description:
`withborder` {boolean} - When true, adds borders all around the accordion container.

Property: withborder

Default: false

attributes.name: on`change`
attributes.description: ``change`` {`CustomEvent<any>`} - Emitted when an accordion item's expanded state changes.
